tool_input.content:
{
  "stage": "impl_planner",
  "status": "complete",
  "jira_issue": "RAG-001",
  "branch": "RAG-001_foundation-spike",
  "date": "2026-02-23",
  "appetite": "2-3 weeks",
  "total_units": 29,
  "total_files": 40,

  "work_streams": [
    {
      "name": "spike",
      "description": "Validate critical technical assumptions before committing to implementation",
      "duration": "Days 1-2",
      "is_gate": true,
      "gate_criteria": "SPIKE-001 and SPIKE-002 must PASS. Others have defined fallbacks.",
      "units": [
        {
          "id": "SPIKE-001",
          "title": "Validate Ollama 8192-token context window (2048-cap concern)",
          "files": ["spike/ollama_context_test.go"],
          "dependencies": [],
          "complexity": "S",
          "priority": "CRITICAL",
          "duration_estimate": "30 minutes",
          "acceptance_criteria": [
            "Test program runs and produces clear PASS/FAIL output",
            "If PASS: vectors for full text and truncated text differ significantly (cosine similarity < 0.95)",
            "If FAIL: truncation documented, contingency path (ONNX Runtime) triggered"
          ]
        },
        {
          "id": "SPIKE-002",
          "title": "Validate bleve v2 FAISS with 768-dim vectors",
          "files": ["spike/bleve_768dim_test.go"],
          "dependencies": [],
          "complexity": "S",
          "duration_estimate": "1 hour",
          "acceptance_criteria": [
            "Index creation succeeds with 768-dim vector field",
            "KNN search returns results ranked by cosine similarity",
            "Hybrid BM25+KNN search returns fused results",
            "No panics or errors with 768-dim vectors"
          ]
        },
        {
          "id": "SPIKE-003",
          "title": "Benchmark Ollama embedding latency on target hardware",
          "files": ["spike/ollama_latency_test.go"],
          "dependencies": [],
          "complexity": "S",
          "duration_estimate": "30 minutes",
          "acceptance_criteria": [
            "Warm p95 < 50ms for single query embedding",
            "Cold-start latency documented",
            "Batch throughput documented"
          ]
        },
        {
          "id": "SPIKE-004",
          "title": "Validate Go MCP SDK structuredContent support",
          "files": ["spike/mcp_sdk_test.go"],
          "dependencies": [],
          "complexity": "S",
          "duration_estimate": "1 hour",
          "acceptance_criteria": [
            "structuredContent support documented (yes/no)",
            "Minimal MCP server compiles and responds to tool calls via stdio",
            "Tool parameter schemas can be defined programmatically",
            "Fallback path (JSON in TextContent) confirmed working"
          ]
        },
        {
          "id": "SPIKE-005",
          "title": "Validate Ollama task prefix handling for nomic-embed-text",
          "files": ["spike/ollama_prefix_test.go"],
          "dependencies": [],
          "complexity": "S",
          "duration_estimate": "15 minutes",
          "acceptance_criteria": [
            "Prefixed vectors differ from raw vector (cosine similarity < 0.98)",
            "Document prefix and query prefix produce different vectors",
            "If prefixes ignored: behavior documented"
          ]
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "name": "foundation",
      "description": "Core types, configuration, and embedder interface",
      "duration": "Days 2-4",
      "units": [
        {
          "id": "UNIT-001",
          "title": "Domain types (Chunk, Document, IndexResult)",
          "files": ["internal/domain/chunk.go", "internal/domain/chunk_test.go"],
          "dependencies": [],
          "complexity": "S",
          "acceptance_criteria": [
            "Chunk, Document, IndexResult types defined with exported fields",
            "SlugFromPath helper normalizes filename to slug",
            "QualifiedID helper produces '{slug}:{sectionID}' format",
            "Unit tests for slug generation edge cases"
          ]
        },
        {
          "id": "UNIT-002",
          "title": "Configuration loading (JSON + env + defaults)",
          "files": ["internal/config/config.go", "internal/config/config_test.go"],
          "dependencies": [],
          "complexity": "M",
          "acceptance_criteria": [
            "Load with empty path returns config with all defaults populated",
            "Load with JSON file reads and merges with defaults",
            "RAG_MCP_* env vars override file values",
            "Invalid JSON returns descriptive error",
            "All config structs defined: EmbedderConfig, KnowledgeConfig, SearchConfig, SecurityConfig, LogConfig"
          ]
        },
        {
          "id": "UNIT-003",
          "title": "Embedder interface and MockEmbedder",
          "files": ["internal/embedder/embedder.go"],
          "dependencies": [],
          "complexity": "S",
          "acceptance_criteria": [
            "Embedder interface with Embed, EmbedBatch, Dimensions, MaxTokens, Close",
            "Purpose enum with PurposeIndex and PurposeQuery",
            "MockEmbedder produces deterministic 768-dim vectors",
            "MockEmbedder.EmbedBatch returns vectors in same order as inputs"
          ]
        },
        {
          "id": "UNIT-004",
          "title": "Ollama HTTP backend implementation",
          "files": ["internal/embedder/ollama.go", "internal/embedder/ollama_test.go"],
          "dependencies": ["UNIT-003"],
          "complexity": "M",
          "acceptance_criteria": [
            "POST /api/embed with correct JSON body",
            "Task prefix prepending for PurposeIndex (search_document:) and PurposeQuery (search_query:)",
            "EmbedBatch sends multiple inputs in one call",
            "Health check at construction time (fail fast if unreachable)",
            "Context cancellation propagated to HTTP call",
            "Vector dimension mismatch returns error",
            "Unit tests with httptest.Server mock"
          ]
        },
        {
          "id": "UNIT-005",
          "title": "Embedder factory (NewEmbedder)",
          "files": ["internal/embedder/factory.go", "internal/embedder/factory_test.go"],
          "dependencies": ["UNIT-002", "UNIT-004"],
          "complexity": "S",
          "acceptance_criteria": [
            "'ollama' and '' both construct OllamaBackend",
            "Unknown backend returns descriptive error",
            "'onnx' returns 'not yet implemented' error"
          ]
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "name": "ingest",
      "description": "Markdown parsing, security filtering, chunking, embedding, and indexing pipeline",
      "duration": "Days 3-7",
      "units": [
        {
          "id": "UNIT-006",
          "title": "Security filter (4-layer)",
          "files": ["internal/ingest/security.go", "internal/ingest/security_test.go"],
          "dependencies": ["UNIT-002"],
          "complexity": "S",
          "acceptance_criteria": [
            "Extension allowlist: .md and .txt pass, .go rejected",
            "Filename blocklist: .env.md rejected",
            "Directory blocklist: node_modules/ rejected",
            "Size limit: files > maxFileSizeBytes rejected",
            "FilterResult includes rejection reason"
          ]
        },
        {
          "id": "UNIT-007",
          "title": "YAML front matter extraction",
          "files": ["internal/ingest/frontmatter.go", "internal/ingest/frontmatter_test.go"],
          "dependencies": [],
          "complexity": "S",
          "acceptance_criteria": [
            "Extracts known fields (title, kind, date, tags, status, supersedes, related, scope)",
            "Unknown fields captured in Raw map",
            "No front matter: returns zero FrontMatter, full content as body",
            "Missing closing ---: returns zero FrontMatter, full content",
            "Empty front matter: no error"
          ]
        },
        {
          "id": "UNIT-008",
          "title": "Section ID extraction (4-level priority)",
          "files": ["internal/ingest/sectionid.go", "internal/ingest/sectionid_test.go"],
          "dependencies": [],
          "complexity": "S",
          "acceptance_criteria": [
            "Lettered: 'A.1 - Trust in Claims' -> id='A.1'",
            "Numbered: '3. Getting Started' -> id='3'",
            "Simple: '3 Getting Started' -> id='3'",
            "Slug: 'My Custom Section' -> id='my-custom-section'",
            "Empty heading -> id='untitled'"
          ]
        },
        {
          "id": "UNIT-009",
          "title": "Markdown parser (## section-level chunking)",
          "files": ["internal/ingest/parser.go", "internal/ingest/parser_test.go", "internal/ingest/testdata/"],
          "dependencies": ["UNIT-001", "UNIT-007", "UNIT-008"],
          "complexity": "M",
          "acceptance_criteria": [
            "Simple document with 3 ## sections produces 3 chunks",
            "Chunks have correct QualifiedID format",
            "### subsections included in parent ## chunk",
            "YAML front matter fields propagated to chunks",
            "Front matter kind overrides parameter kind",
            "Sub-splitting triggers when content > maxChunkSize",
            "Document with no ## headers produces 1 chunk",
            "Position field sequential (0, 1, 2, ...)",
            "Testdata covers: simple, frontmatter, long-section, no-headers"
          ]
        },
        {
          "id": "UNIT-010",
          "title": "Bleve index manager (create, store, hash tracking, retrieve)",
          "files": ["internal/ingest/indexer.go", "internal/ingest/indexer_test.go"],
          "dependencies": ["UNIT-001", "UNIT-003"],
          "complexity": "L",
          "acceptance_criteria": [
            "Create new index with 768-dim vector field + text field + metadata fields",
            "Re-open existing index succeeds",
            "StoreChunks writes chunks retrievable by QualifiedID",
            "Same QualifiedID updates (upsert, not duplicate)",
            "RemoveDocument removes all chunks for document slug",
            "HasChanged returns correct results for new/changed/unchanged documents",
            "Concurrent reads during writes: race detector clean",
            "Index persists across close/reopen cycle",
            "Requires -tags vectors build tag"
          ]
        },
        {
          "id": "UNIT-011",
          "title": "File and directory indexing pipeline with deleted file detection",
          "files": ["internal/ingest/pipeline.go", "internal/ingest/pipeline_test.go"],
          "dependencies": ["UNIT-006", "UNIT-009", "UNIT-010", "UNIT-004"],
          "complexity": "L",
          "acceptance_criteria": [
            "Single file: parses, embeds, stores (IndexResult.Indexed=1)",
            "Unchanged file: skipped (IndexResult.Unchanged=1)",
            "Modified file: re-indexed (IndexResult.Indexed=1)",
            "Directory with blocked files: only allowed files processed",
            "Deleted file detected and chunks removed (IndexResult.Removed=1)",
            "force=true: all files re-processed regardless of hash",
            "IndexGlobalSources: processes multiple paths with scope=global",
            "Context cancellation stops processing mid-directory"
          ]
        },
        {
          "id": "UNIT-012",
          "title": "Atomic swap for force rebuilds",
          "files": ["internal/ingest/swap.go", "internal/ingest/swap_test.go"],
          "dependencies": ["UNIT-010"],
          "complexity": "M",
          "acceptance_criteria": [
            "Successful rebuild: new index replaces old, all documents present",
            "Failed rebuild: old index preserved, queryable (INV-5)",
            "Temp path cleaned up on both success and failure",
            "Existing index remains queryable during rebuild"
          ]
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "name": "search",
      "description": "Hybrid search, result formatting, and section retrieval",
      "duration": "Days 6-9",
      "units": [
        {
          "id": "UNIT-013",
          "title": "Hybrid BM25+KNN search with RRF fusion",
          "files": ["internal/search/search.go", "internal/search/search_test.go"],
          "dependencies": ["UNIT-010", "UNIT-003"],
          "complexity": "L",
          "acceptance_criteria": [
            "Hybrid search returns results ranked by fused RRF score",
            "BM25-only fallback when embedder fails",
            "Results capped at limit parameter",
            "Empty index returns empty results with IndexState='empty'",
            "Search time recorded in response",
            "Context cancellation stops search"
          ]
        },
        {
          "id": "UNIT-014",
          "title": "Search filtering (scope, kind, tags)",
          "files": ["internal/search/search.go"],
          "dependencies": ["UNIT-013"],
          "complexity": "S",
          "acceptance_criteria": [
            "scope='global' returns only global chunks",
            "scope='project' returns only project chunks",
            "scope='all' or '' returns both scopes",
            "kind='decision' returns only decision chunks",
            "tags filter: multiple tags AND-ed",
            "Filters compose correctly with hybrid search"
          ]
        },
        {
          "id": "UNIT-015",
          "title": "Result formatting and snippet generation",
          "files": ["internal/search/results.go", "internal/search/results_test.go"],
          "dependencies": ["UNIT-001"],
          "complexity": "S",
          "acceptance_criteria": [
            "Snippet truncates at 500 chars at word boundary",
            "Score rounded to 4 decimal places",
            "All chunk metadata propagated to Result",
            "JSON tags present on all fields"
          ]
        },
        {
          "id": "UNIT-016",
          "title": "Read: section retrieval by qualified ID",
          "files": ["internal/search/read.go", "internal/search/read_test.go"],
          "dependencies": ["UNIT-010"],
          "complexity": "M",
          "acceptance_criteria": [
            "Qualified ID lookup returns full chunk content",
            "Nonexistent ID returns Found=false",
            "Ambiguous unqualified ID returns disambiguation error",
            "Full content returned (not snippet)",
            "Metadata included in response"
          ]
        },
        {
          "id": "UNIT-017",
          "title": "Read: document-level table of contents",
          "files": ["internal/search/read.go"],
          "dependencies": ["UNIT-016"],
          "complexity": "S",
          "acceptance_criteria": [
            "Document slug returns section list with sectionId and title",
            "Sections ordered by Position",
            "Full content NOT returned",
            "Unknown slug returns Found=false"
          ]
        },
        {
          "id": "UNIT-018",
          "title": "Read: context expansion (adjacent sections)",
          "files": ["internal/search/read.go"],
          "dependencies": ["UNIT-016"],
          "complexity": "S",
          "acceptance_criteria": [
            "context=1 returns target section + 1 before + 1 after",
            "First section with context=1 returns only next section",
            "Context chunks sorted by Position",
            "context=0 returns no context"
          ]
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "name": "server",
      "description": "MCP transport, tool handlers, and server lifecycle",
      "duration": "Days 8-11",
      "units": [
        {
          "id": "UNIT-019",
          "title": "MCP server setup with stdio transport",
          "files": ["internal/server/server.go", "internal/server/server_test.go"],
          "dependencies": ["UNIT-002"],
          "complexity": "M",
          "acceptance_criteria": [
            "Server starts and accepts MCP tool calls via stdio",
            "4 tool schemas registered with correct parameter definitions",
            "Invalid tool names return MCP error",
            "Server responds to tools/list with all 4 tools"
          ]
        },
        {
          "id": "UNIT-020",
          "title": "Search tool handler",
          "files": ["internal/server/tools.go"],
          "dependencies": ["UNIT-013", "UNIT-019"],
          "complexity": "S",
          "acceptance_criteria": [
            "Parses query, scope, kind, tags, limit from MCP call",
            "Delegates to Searcher.Search",
            "Returns SearchResponse as JSON",
            "Missing query returns MCP error",
            "Invalid scope/kind returns error with valid values"
          ]
        },
        {
          "id": "UNIT-021",
          "title": "Read tool handler",
          "files": ["internal/server/tools.go"],
          "dependencies": ["UNIT-016", "UNIT-019"],
          "complexity": "S",
          "acceptance_criteria": [
            "Parses id and context parameters",
            "Delegates to Searcher.Read",
            "Returns full content for section reads, section list for document reads",
            "Missing id returns MCP error"
          ]
        },
        {
          "id": "UNIT-022",
          "title": "Index tool handler",
          "files": ["internal/server/tools.go"],
          "dependencies": ["UNIT-011", "UNIT-019"],
          "complexity": "S",
          "acceptance_criteria": [
            "Parses path, scope, kind, force parameters",
            "Delegates to Pipeline.IndexPath",
            "Returns IndexResult as JSON",
            "Non-existent path returns descriptive error"
          ]
        },
        {
          "id": "UNIT-023",
          "title": "Status tool handler",
          "files": ["internal/server/tools.go"],
          "dependencies": ["UNIT-010", "UNIT-019"],
          "complexity": "S",
          "acceptance_criteria": [
            "Returns document count, chunk count, uptime, embedder info",
            "Completes within 10ms (NFR-003)",
            "Returns ready=false when index is empty"
          ]
        },
        {
          "id": "UNIT-024",
          "title": "Server lifecycle (startup, global indexing, graceful shutdown)",
          "files": ["cmd/rag-mcp/main.go"],
          "dependencies": ["UNIT-002", "UNIT-005", "UNIT-010", "UNIT-011", "UNIT-013", "UNIT-019"],
          "complexity": "M",
          "acceptance_criteria": [
            "Server starts with config file flag or defaults",
            "Embedder unreachable -> fail with clear error",
            "Global sources indexed on first startup",
            "Global sources hash-checked in background on subsequent startups",
            "SIGTERM triggers graceful shutdown within 5 seconds",
            "In-flight operations complete before shutdown",
            "All resources closed (no goroutine leaks)"
          ]
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "name": "evaluation",
      "description": "Golden test set, NDCG measurement, integration testing",
      "duration": "Days 10-14",
      "units": [
        {
          "id": "UNIT-025",
          "title": "Golden test corpus (10-15 markdown documents)",
          "files": [
            "eval/corpus/fpf-excerpt.md",
            "eval/corpus/engineering-philosophy.md",
            "eval/corpus/style-guide.md",
            "eval/corpus/debug-methods.md",
            "eval/corpus/decision-009-embedding.md",
            "eval/corpus/decision-011-tools.md",
            "eval/corpus/architecture.md",
            "eval/corpus/prd-excerpt.md",
            "eval/corpus/retry-patterns.md",
            "eval/corpus/testing-philosophy.md"
          ],
          "dependencies": [],
          "complexity": "M",
          "acceptance_criteria": [
            "10+ documents covering global and project scopes",
            "At least 3 documents with YAML front matter",
            "At least 2 decision documents with tags, supersedes, status",
            "At least 1 document with section > 8000 chars",
            "Total corpus produces 80-120 chunks",
            "Documents cover distinct knowledge domains"
          ]
        },
        {
          "id": "UNIT-026",
          "title": "Golden query set (30 queries with expected results)",
          "files": ["eval/golden_queries.json"],
          "dependencies": ["UNIT-025"],
          "complexity": "M",
          "acceptance_criteria": [
            "30 queries with 1-3 expected top results each",
            "Queries cover: error handling, architecture, coding patterns, design rationale, testing",
            "Mix of specific and conceptual queries",
            "Mix of filtered (scope/kind) and unfiltered queries",
            "Each query has description explaining agent scenario"
          ]
        },
        {
          "id": "UNIT-027",
          "title": "NDCG@10 measurement framework",
          "files": ["eval/eval.go", "eval/eval_test.go", "eval/ndcg.go"],
          "dependencies": ["UNIT-025", "UNIT-026", "UNIT-013"],
          "complexity": "M",
          "acceptance_criteria": [
            "Computes NDCG@10 using standard DCG/IDCG formula",
            "Reports per-query NDCG for debugging",
            "Reports top-3 hit rate",
            "Prints summary with pass/fail against threshold (0.75)",
            "Runnable via go test ./eval/..."
          ]
        },
        {
          "id": "UNIT-028",
          "title": "Read correctness tests (100% for valid IDs)",
          "files": ["eval/read_test.go"],
          "dependencies": ["UNIT-025", "UNIT-016"],
          "complexity": "S",
          "acceptance_criteria": [
            "Every section in golden corpus readable by qualified ID",
            "Content matches original document section exactly",
            "Document-level reads return correct section count and titles",
            "Context expansion returns correct adjacent sections"
          ]
        },
        {
          "id": "UNIT-029",
          "title": "End-to-end integration test harness",
          "files": ["eval/integration_test.go"],
          "dependencies": ["UNIT-024", "UNIT-025", "UNIT-003"],
          "complexity": "M",
          "acceptance_criteria": [
            "Full pipeline: config -> embedder -> indexer -> pipeline -> searcher -> server",
            "Index golden corpus via pipeline",
            "5 search queries return non-empty results",
            "5 read queries return correct content",
            "Status query returns correct counts",
            "Index query on single file: incremental update works",
            "All tests pass with MockEmbedder (no real Ollama)",
            "All tests pass with race detector (go test -race)"
          ]
        }
      ]
    }
  ],

  "milestones": [
    {
      "name": "Week 1 Gate",
      "day": 5,
      "criteria": [
        "Spike complete: GO/NO-GO decided",
        "Can parse markdown, embed sections via Ollama, store in bleve index",
        "Can retrieve chunk by qualified ID",
        "go test ./internal/... passes"
      ],
      "units_complete": ["SPIKE-001", "SPIKE-002", "SPIKE-003", "SPIKE-004", "SPIKE-005", "UNIT-001", "UNIT-002", "UNIT-003", "UNIT-004", "UNIT-005", "UNIT-006", "UNIT-007", "UNIT-008", "UNIT-009", "UNIT-010"]
    },
    {
      "name": "Week 2 Gate",
      "day": 10,
      "criteria": [
        "Fully functional MCP server",
        "All 4 tools respond correctly",
        "go test ./... passes",
        "Manual end-to-end test with Claude Code"
      ],
      "units_complete": ["UNIT-011", "UNIT-012", "UNIT-013", "UNIT-014", "UNIT-015", "UNIT-016", "UNIT-017", "UNIT-018", "UNIT-019", "UNIT-020", "UNIT-021", "UNIT-022", "UNIT-023", "UNIT-024"]
    },
    {
      "name": "Week 3 Gate (Ship)",
      "day": 15,
      "criteria": [
        "NDCG@10 >= 0.75 on 30-query golden set",
        "Top-3 hit rate >= 90%",
        "All tests pass including eval",
        "golangci-lint run clean",
        "go test -race passes"
      ],
      "units_complete": ["UNIT-025", "UNIT-026", "UNIT-027", "UNIT-028", "UNIT-029"]
    }
  ],

  "risks": [
    {
      "id": "R1",
      "title": "Ollama 2048-token context cap",
      "probability": "Medium",
      "impact": "High",
      "mitigation": "SPIKE-001 validates in 30 minutes. If confirmed, trigger ONNX Runtime contingency.",
      "spike": "SPIKE-001"
    },
    {
      "id": "R2",
      "title": "Bleve FAISS API complexity at 768-dim",
      "probability": "Low",
      "impact": "Medium",
      "mitigation": "SPIKE-002 validates. Fallback: Matryoshka truncation to 384-dim.",
      "spike": "SPIKE-002"
    },
    {
      "id": "R3",
      "title": "Search quality below NDCG@10 0.75 threshold",
      "probability": "Medium",
      "impact": "High",
      "mitigation": "BM25/KNN weights configurable. Task prefixes improve quality. Week 3 buffer for tuning."
    },
    {
      "id": "R4",
      "title": "Go MCP SDK maturity gaps",
      "probability": "Low",
      "impact": "Medium",
      "mitigation": "SPIKE-004 validates. Fallback: JSON in TextContent.",
      "spike": "SPIKE-004"
    },
    {
      "id": "R5",
      "title": "Ollama cold-start latency (500ms+ on first call)",
      "probability": "High",
      "impact": "Low",
      "mitigation": "Warm model at server startup. Global source indexing naturally warms model."
    }
  ],

  "contingencies": [
    {
      "trigger": "SPIKE-001 FAIL: Ollama truncates at 2048 tokens",
      "impact": "+2-3 days in Week 1",
      "changes": [
        "Replace UNIT-004 (OllamaBackend) with UNIT-004a (ONNXBackend, ~200 lines, CGo)",
        "Add UNIT-004b (BPE tokenizer for nomic)",
        "Add UNIT-004c (ONNX model download and caching)",
        "Go build gains CGo dependency",
        "Docker image bundles libonnxruntime.so"
      ],
      "unchanged": [
        "Embedder interface (UNIT-003) absorbs the change",
        "All consumer code (ingest, search, server) unaffected",
        "Evaluation framework unchanged",
        "Total architecture unchanged"
      ],
      "new_units": [
        {
          "id": "UNIT-004a",
          "title": "ONNX Runtime backend",
          "files": ["internal/embedder/onnx.go", "internal/embedder/onnx_test.go"],
          "complexity": "L",
          "dependencies": ["UNIT-003"]
        },
        {
          "id": "UNIT-004b",
          "title": "BPE tokenizer for nomic-embed-text",
          "files": ["internal/embedder/tokenizer.go", "internal/embedder/tokenizer_test.go"],
          "complexity": "M",
          "dependencies": []
        },
        {
          "id": "UNIT-004c",
          "title": "ONNX model download and caching",
          "files": ["internal/embedder/model.go"],
          "complexity": "S",
          "dependencies": []
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "trigger": "SPIKE-002 FAIL: 768-dim vectors not supported",
      "impact": "Minimal (config change)",
      "changes": [
        "Set embedder.dimensions to 384 in config defaults",
        "Use Matryoshka truncation (post-inference slicing of 768 -> 384)",
        "Bleve vector field configured for 384 dimensions"
      ],
      "unchanged": ["Everything else"]
    },
    {
      "trigger": "SPIKE-004 FAIL: No structuredContent in Go MCP SDK",
      "impact": "None (fallback is the plan)",
      "changes": [
        "Tool responses use JSON marshalled into TextContent",
        "No structuredContent in responses"
      ],
      "unchanged": ["Response data structure identical, just wrapped in TextContent"]
    }
  ],

  "parallelism": [
    {
      "set": "Foundation core",
      "units": ["UNIT-001", "UNIT-002", "UNIT-003"],
